creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Please, don't submit updates for existing ports as *.shar files. It's hard to tell which version it was based on or what you've changed.

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/port-upgrading.html#svn-diff
https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/articles/problem-reports/article.html#pr-writing-attaching-patches

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 226408 ***
